title: PublicHeadersUnchangedOutput
description: Output structure for the public_headers_unchanged predicate.

passed.description: True iff SHA-256(before public headers) == SHA-256(after public headers).

before_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the concatenated sorted public header contents before the task.

after_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the concatenated sorted public header contents after the task.

differing_files.description: List of header file paths whose content changed. Empty when passed=true.
